completedTasks.instruction: Integrate db.ts module and setup DataManager service.
Update Git path references in components and services to use manifest.data.git instead of manifest.git.

Create a single ToolManager.tsx component that imports appdata.json. It should map through the tools and, when one is selected, render it inside a single reusable StandaloneLoader component. All communication between the main app and the tool must happen via the ToolBridge.ts service using postMessage
